description_long: This car store consists of a large, rectangular building with a dark, gabled roof and a wide, multi-bay garage entrance facing the main road. The structure is flanked by adjacent commercial buildings, and the property includes a paved driveway and parking area with several cars visible in front. The facade is primarily white with large, gridded windows and garage doors, providing visibility into the showroom and service areas. The surrounding area features a sidewalk, a two-lane road, and some landscaping elements such as grass patches and small trees. The overall design is functional and modern, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements. The building appears to be constructed from concrete, glass, and metal, typical of contemporary commercial architecture.
description: A modern, white car store with a dark gabled roof, large garage doors, and a paved parking area with several cars in front. The building features large windows and a functional, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with wide garage doors, large windows, and several cars parked along the road.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building, the parking area, and the adjacent commercial structures.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the back entrances, service areas, and some outdoor spaces behind the main building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the parking lot, side entrances, and additional landscaping elements.
attribute_displayed_cars: Three cars visible in front: one gray sedan, one blue compact, and one white SUV, all parked parallel to the road.
attribute_glass_facade: Large gridded glass windows on the front facade and garage doors, providing visibility into the showroom.
